//: Drop this into your project as .mcp.json (Claude Code) or the equivalent MCP settings block in Cursor / Windsurf / Zed. Run `engram login` once first so the device key exists. Replace the path with wherever you cloned Engram. Engram auto-detects the repo from the current git remote, so none needs to be named here; set ENGRAM_REPO only to pin a specific one (e.g. "demo" to try it against the live sample).
